name: Micheal Tim Joseph Enriquez
title: Full-Stack Developer | IT Student
about: I’m Micheal, a developer and designer based in Cagayan de Oro, Philippines. I lead and integrate projects like DreamHome and Hackathons, focusing on building scalable systems with clean, modern dashboards. Right now, I’m aiming for pixel-perfect UI polish and seamless functionality that reflects my vision for professional, user‑centric design.

experience.company: University of Science and Technology of Southern Philippines
experience.description: Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology, I am actively engaged in coursework and projects that enhance my skills in web development, software engineering, and IT solutions. I am committed to applying my knowledge to real-world challenges and continuously improving my technical expertise.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology
education.school: University of Science and Technology of Southern Philippines

projects.name: my-resume
projects.description: A personal resume website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It features a clean and modern design, showcasing my skills, experience, and projects in a visually appealing way. The website is fully responsive and optimized for both desktop and mobile devices.

projects.name: DreamHome
projects.description: A real estate platform with scalable backend and modern dashboard UI.

projects.name: Hackathon Project
projects.description: A rapid-prototype built during a hackathon, focusing on clean UX design.
